name: Birst (Infor) Networked Business Intelligence API
what_it_does: Networked business intelligence platform (now Infor Birst) with REST API — enabling enterprises to build multi-tenant, networked analytics architectures where corporate data models can be extended by business units while maintaining central governance, with automated data modeling, natural language query, and white-labeled BI embedding.
use_cases: Querying Birst/Infor analytics datasets via REST API for external reporting system integration
Embedding Birst dashboards and reports in custom applications via API and JavaScript SDK
Managing Birst data source connections and datasets via API for automated data pipeline
Administering Birst user access and permissions via API for enterprise user provisioning
Exporting Birst report data via API for data lake or data warehouse integration
not_for: Self-service data exploration without IT support (Tableau or Power BI are more user-friendly)
Small business analytics (Birst/Infor targets enterprise with complex data needs)
Real-time operational dashboards (use Grafana or Datadog for real-time monitoring)
best_when: An enterprise that uses Infor ERP systems (CloudSuite, M3, LN) needs embedded analytics with data models consistent with Infor's industry-specific data structures — especially for manufacturing, distribution, and healthcare verticals.
avoid_when: You don't use Infor ERP, are a small/mid-market company, need a best-of-breed BI tool for broad data sources, or have users that need Tableau-level self-service analytics.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with role-based data access. No webhooks. JavaScript embedding SDK for dashboard embedding. REST API for dataset, user, and administration management. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Multi-tenant networked BI architecture with corporate/BU data model separation. Infor OS (Operating Service) for single sign-on across Infor suite.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact Infor sales; typically bundled with Infor ERP
pricing.notes: Originally San Francisco (Birst founded 2004). Acquired by Infor in 2017 for $300M+. Infor acquired by Koch Industries in 2020 for $13B+ (Koch owns Infor outright). Now Infor Birst. Infor serves 17,000+ enterprise customers in manufacturing, distribution, healthcare, hospitality. Birst's networked BI differentiator (corporate → BU data model federation) is unique in market. Competition from Power BI Embedded for white-label use cases. Koch Industries ownership (private, no public reporting) — evaluate vendor stability for long-term.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for analytics management. OAuth2 auth. Enterprise documentation primarily for Infor customers. JavaScript SDK for dashboard embedding. Networked BI architecture adds complexity for API integrations. Infor ERP context often required to get value from Birst data models. Koch Industries private ownership means limited public product roadmap visibility.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics queries fully idempotent. Dataset reads idempotent. Report reads idempotent. User admin reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Tightly coupled with Infor ERP ecosystem — limited value without Infor data models
Koch Industries private ownership — less public roadmap transparency than public BI vendors
Networked BI architecture (corporate/BU data federation) adds data model complexity
Annual enterprise contract required — significant commitment
Documentation quality may lag best-of-breed BI tools (Tableau, Power BI)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Koch Industries (private) ownership with enterprise security standards. Analytics data may include confidential financial and operational metrics — strict role-based access required. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. HIPAA BAA available for healthcare analytics use cases. Networked BI data sharing between BUs requires careful data governance configuration.
